title: trachycalymma buchwaldii
intro: Trachycalymma buchwaldii is a plant species in the family Rubiaceae, commonly known as the yellow-flowering shrub. This plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly in traditional medicine, where it is used to treat various ailments. The leaves and stems of Trachycalymma buchwaldii are used in herbal preparations to treat conditions such as fever, rheumatism, and digestive issues, thanks to its anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties. The health benefits of this plant include reducing pain and inflammation, and its herbal preparations can be found in various forms, including teas, infusions, and tinctures.
